name.description: Kebab-case identifier. Must equal the parent directory name.

version.description: Semantic version, e.g. 1.0.0. Bump on meaningful content changes.

description.description: One-line description. Shown in CLI browse output.

party.description: Optional. '1p' = Microsoft first-party authored; '3p' = third-party / partner. Used to drive the 1p-contribution / 3p-contribution PR labels; not validated against folder path.

lifecycle.description: Authored lifecycle state. Never set to 'degraded' (that is computed).

featureFlag.description: If set, kit is only surfaced in Discovery UI when this feature flag is enabled.

displayName.description: Card title shown in Discovery UI and CLI browse.

longDescription.description: Markdown body for the detail view.

logo.description: HTTPS URL to the kit logo image. Kit folders may only contain kit.json (see SKT-STR-008), so assets must be hosted externally and linked via HTTPS.

screenshots.description: HTTPS URLs to screenshot images. Kit folders may only contain kit.json (see SKT-STR-008), so assets must be hosted externally and linked via HTTPS.

agentRefs.description: All agents used by this kit. Exactly one must have role:primary and required:true.

samplePrompts.description: Rich UI prompts with difficulty and expected output. Required for lifecycle:active kits.

role.description: primary: the launch agent for this kit. supporting: auxiliary agent.

required.description: If true, kit is degraded when this agent is absent from the registry.

description.description: Human-readable description of this agent's role in the kit.

id.description: Stable identifier for this prompt, e.g. sp-1.

prompt.description: Full prompt text shown in the Discovery UI 'Try it' tile.

expectedOutput.description: Description of what the user should expect as output.

riskProfile.description: Trust and compliance information surfaced as UI chips.

requiresExternalCompute.description: Whether any agent calls an external compute service.

dataResidency.description: Freeform description of data residency. E.g. 'user-managed Azure subscription'.
